summary: Made the normalized Worten commands explicit and publish-validator-visible.
reason: The generated helper shape hid real commands like product, buyer, and snapshot from publish-time static validation. This local patch preserves the normalized command layer while keeping the validator and command help in sync.
validated_outcome: cli-printing-press dogfood --live --dir . --level quick and cli-printing-press publish validate --dir . --json both passed after the command help and examples were fixed.

deferred_to_upstream.feature: Generated support for validator-visible novel command declarations with complete help examples
deferred_to_upstream.reason: The local CLI has hand-authored normalized commands that the current generator and validators do not model together cleanly.
